# PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.highQualityFormat

**Case**

Photos provides only the highest quality video available.

## Declaration

```swift
case highQualityFormat
```

## Constants

- **PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.automatic**: Photos automatically determines which quality of video data to provide based on the request and current conditions.
- **PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.mediumQualityFormat**: Photos provides a video of moderate quality unless a higher quality version is locally cached.
- **PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.fastFormat**: Photos provides whatever quality of video can be most quickly loaded.
